takeaways: Market declined (Nifty -2.03%). Look for opportunities in quality stocks with strong fundamentals — dips are for accumulating, not panicking.
Sector rotation: Pharma leads (+2.3% month), IT lags (-16.4%). Consider tilting new allocation toward sectors with strong momentum.
26 watchlist stocks show accumulate signals: POLICYBZR, RATEGAIN, NETWEB, PERSISTENT, SAFARI. Build positions in 2-3 tranches; max 6% per name.
3 watchlist stocks on wait: NTPC, GODFRYPHLP, DIXON. Avoid catching falling knives — wait for trend reversal confirmation.
Macro watch: Crude at $75.42, USD/INR at 92.14. Rising crude or weakening INR can pressure IT/pharma margins short-term but often creates accumulation opportunities in exporters.
Position sizing: Max 6% in any single name. Multi-year horizon — don't chase momentum; buy quality on weakness. Tax-efficient if held > 1 year.
learning_questions: Do you follow earnings season closely? Want per-stock earnings calendar?
Preference for dividend-paying stocks vs pure growth?
Would weekly portfolio review summaries be useful?
